title: pathetos #3805
definition:
1) passible, endued with the capacity of suffering, capable of feeling
 2) subject to the necessity of suffering, destined to suffer
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) passible, endued with the capacity of suffering, capable of feeling
 2) subject to the necessity of suffering, destined to suffer

    NASB:  one who has suffered or is subject to suffering:
